segments: Caroline : Hey Mel! Good to see you! been? Melanie : Hey Caroline! Good swamped with kids work. What ' s up with you? Anything new? Caroline : Hey Melanie! How ' s going? about my school event last week awesome talked transgender journey encouraged students involved in LGBTQ community great to see their reactions made me reflect on far come since started transitioning three years ago. Caroline : Hey Melanie! wanted to say hi! Melanie : Caroline Good to talk to you again. What ' s up? new since last time? What did it look like? Melanie : sky clear filled with stars meteor shower amazing felt part of something huge awe - inspiring. Caroline :, Mel. breathtaking!
